creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to mikhail.rokhin from comment #18)

No, there does not need to be an option for this. -- If adridg and I are correct, you are simply using packages for a CPU type your CPU does not support. There's nothing we can do here, except telling you to dial back the tuning to something your CPU supports.



mfg Tobias
